case_title: BOJANA RNJAK VS. MIKHAIL TSOTSIASHVILI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,218.00 FILED BY RNJAK, BOJANA AS TO DEFENDANT TSOTSIASHVILI, MIKHAIL DENTAL CITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RNJAK, BOJANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TSOTSIASHVILI, MIKHAIL DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENTAL CITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DENTAL CITY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-01-2014 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. (2) DEFENDANTS WERE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DENTAL CITY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
